use_cases: Display customer testimonials on landing pages to build trust and credibility
Showcase user reviews and feedback in a rotating carousel format
Highlight social proof for products or services across various industries
Present client endorsements in a visually engaging sliding component
Create a testimonial section that showcases multiple customer voices dynamically
ai_summary: A testimonial slider component that displays customer testimonials and reviews in a sliding carousel format. This data-display component is designed to showcase social proof and build credibility with potential customers. The minimalist design allows it to blend seamlessly into various landing pages and marketing sections across both desktop and mobile platforms.
